description: The default RabbitMQ container image used by `AddRabbitMQ` has been updated from `4.2` to `4.3`. Note that RabbitMQ 4.3 rejects transient (non-durable) non-exclusive queue declarations by default; applications relying on such queues will need to update their queue declarations.
name: Bump RabbitMQ default container image to 4.3
